meta.purpose: Reasoning chains for knowledge management judgment — why collection is not knowledge.
meta.load_condition: Load when user asks why their knowledge system is not working.

reasoning_chains.one_sentence: Saving is easy. Testing is hard. Most knowledge systems optimize for the easy part.
logic: Capturing a note takes seconds. Testing whether the note contains a true, bounded, and applicable claim takes much longer.
Tools optimize for capture speed (quick add, browser extensions, mobile capture) because it is the habit-forming action.
The user accumulates 1000 notes and feels productive. But the notes have never been tested against a proposition, boundary, counter-example, or evolution.
The system is optimized for input velocity with zero processing throughput.
reasoning_chains.so_what: Do not recommend capture tools or organization improvements. Recommend processing one existing note into a knowledge asset.
